file_contents..bashrc:
# ~/.bashrc: executed by bash(1) for non-login shells.

# If not running interactively, don't do anything
case $- in
    *i*) ;;
      *) return;;
esac

HISTCONTROL=ignoreboth
HISTSIZE=1000
HISTFILESIZE=2000
shopt -s histappend
shopt -s checkwinsize

PS1='${debian_chroot:+($debian_chroot)}\u@\h:\w\$ '

alias ll='ls -alF'
alias la='ls -A'
alias l='ls -CF'
alias grep='grep --color=auto'

export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/bin
file_contents..profile:
# ~/.profile: executed by the command interpreter for login shells.

if [ -n "$BASH_VERSION" ]; then
    if [ -f "$HOME/.bashrc" ]; then
        . "$HOME/.bashrc"
    fi
fi

PATH="$HOME/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"

file_contents.Documents/project_notes.txt:
# Internal Server Migration Notes

Phase 1: Database migration (COMPLETED)
  - Migrated MySQL 5.7 -> 8.0
  - Backup stored at /var/lib/mysql_backup_20240115/

Phase 2: Application deployment (IN PROGRESS)
  - Docker containers on 10.0.0.10-15
  - k8s cluster credentials in /opt/k8s/admin.conf

Phase 3: Network segmentation (PENDING)

  - Firewall rules draft at /etc/iptables/rules.v4

Credentials:

file_contents.Documents/meeting_minutes.md:
# Team Meeting - Jan 20, 2026

## Attendees
- Sarah (Lead), Mike (DevOps), Anna (Security)

## Discussion
1. Server hardening postponed to Q2
2. Vulnerability scan revealed 3 critical CVEs
   - CVE-2024-21762 (FortiOS) - URGENT
   - CVE-2024-1709 (ScreenConnect)
   - CVE-2024-3400 (PAN-OS)
3. Patch schedule: weekends only

## Action Items
- Mike: Update firewall rules by Friday
- Anna: Run penetration test on staging
- Sarah: Review access control lists

file_contents.Downloads/setup.sh:
#!/bin/bash
# Quick server setup script
apt update && apt upgrade -y
apt install -y nginx mysql-server python3-pip
systemctl enable nginx mysql
ufw allow 22/tcp
ufw allow 80/tcp
ufw allow 443/tcp
ufw enable
echo 'Setup complete'

file_contents./etc/fstab:
# /etc/fstab: static file system information.
#
# <file system>  <mount point>  <type>  <options>       <dump> <pass>
UUID=a1b2c3d4    /              ext4    errors=remount-ro 0     1
UUID=e5f6a7b8    /boot          ext2    defaults        0     2
UUID=c9d0e1f2    none           swap    sw              0     0
/dev/sda3        /var           ext4    defaults        0     2
file_contents./etc/crontab:
SHELL=/bin/sh
PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin

# m h dom mon dow user    command
17 *    * * *   root    cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.hourly
25 6    * * *   root    test -x /usr/sbin/anacron || ( cd / && run-parts --report /etc/cron.daily )
0  */6  * * *   root    /usr/local/bin/backup.sh >> /var/log/backup.log 2>&1
*/5 *   * * *   www-data /var/www/html/cron_job.php
file_contents./etc/ssh/sshd_config:
# SSH Server Configuration
Port 22
ListenAddress 0.0.0.0
Protocol 2
HostKey /etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key
PermitRootLogin yes
PasswordAuthentication yes
PubkeyAuthentication yes
AuthorizedKeysFile .ssh/authorized_keys
MaxAuthTries 6
MaxSessions 10
X11Forwarding yes
UsePAM yes
AcceptEnv LANG LC_*
Subsystem sftp /usr/lib/openssh/sftp-server
file_contents./etc/network/interfaces:
# This file describes the network interfaces
auto lo
iface lo inet loopback

auto eth0
iface eth0 inet static
    address 192.168.1.105
    netmask 255.255.255.0
    gateway 192.168.1.1
    dns-nameservers 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4

file_contents./etc/security/limits.conf:
# /etc/security/limits.conf
#<domain>  <type>  <item>  <value>
*          soft    nofile  65535
*          hard    nofile  65535
www-data   soft    nproc   4096
www-data   hard    nproc   8192
mysql      soft    nofile  65535
mysql      hard    nofile  65535
file_contents./etc/mysql/my.cnf:
[mysqld]
user            = mysql
pid-file        = /var/run/mysqld/mysqld.pid
socket          = /var/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock
port            = 3306
datadir         = /var/lib/mysql
bind-address    = 0.0.0.0
max_connections = 150
log_error       = /var/log/mysql/error.log
slow_query_log  = 1
slow_query_log_file = /var/log/mysql/slow.log
long_query_time = 2

RewriteBase /

    Deny from all
</FilesMatch>
